heading: Loan deficiency payments
label: 9035 Loan deficiency payments
notes: CodificationProvisions of law applicable to a loan commodity for the 2023 crop year pursuant to title I of applicable to the 2024 crop year for that loan commodity, see , set out in an Extension of Agricultural Programs note under .Pub. children.heading: Availability of loan deficiency payments
children.label: a Availability of loan deficiency payments

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (d), the Secretary may make loan deficiency payments available to producers on a farm that, although eligible to obtain a marketing assistance loan under with respect to a loan commodity, agree to forgo obtaining the loan for the commodity in return for loan deficiency payments under this section.section 9031 of this title

children.heading: Marketing assistance loans
children.label: A Marketing assistance loans
children.text: Subject to subparagraph (B), nongraded wool in the form of unshorn pelts and hay and silage derived from a loan commodity are not eligible for a marketing assistance loan under .section 9031 of this title

children.heading: Loan deficiency payment
children.label: B Loan deficiency payment
children.text: Effective for each of the 2014 through 2031 crop years, the Secretary may make loan deficiency payments available under this section to producers on a farm that produce unshorn pelts or hay and silage derived from a loan commodity.
the payment rate determined under subsection (c) for the commodity; by
the quantity of the commodity produced by the eligible producers, excluding any quantity for which the producers obtain a marketing assistance loan under .section 9031 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the loan rate established under for the loan commodity; exceedssection 9032 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: the rate at which a marketing assistance loan for the loan commodity may be repaid under .section 9034 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the loan rate established under for ungraded wool; exceedssection 9032 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: the rate at which a marketing assistance loan for ungraded wool may be repaid under .section 9034 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: the loan rate established under for the loan commodity from which the hay or silage is derived; exceedssection 9032 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: the rate at which a marketing assistance loan for the loan commodity may be repaid under .section 9034 of this title

children.heading: Exception for extra long staple cotton
children.label: d Exception for extra long staple cotton
children.text: This section shall not apply with respect to extra long staple cotton.

children.heading: Effective date for payment rate determination
children.label: e Effective date for payment rate determination
children.text: The Secretary shall determine the amount of the loan deficiency payment to be made under this section to the producers on a farm with respect to a quantity of a loan commodity or commodity referred to in subsection (a)(2) using the payment rate in effect under subsection (c) as of the date the producers request the payment.
